allow: PowerShell(php artisan tinker --execute="use App\\Models\\Category; \\$n=0; foreach\(Category::all\(\) as \\$c\){ \\$i=1; foreach\(\\$c->products\(\)->orderByDesc\('products_id'\)->get\(\) as \\$p\){ \\$c->products\(\)->updateExistingPivot\(\\$p->id,['sort_order'=>\\$i]\); \\$i++; \\$n++; } } echo 'rows seeded: '.\\$n;" 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5)
Bash(rm -f /tmp/seed_sort.php; php artisan view:clear >/dev/null 2>&1; echo "view cache cleared")
